folio.label: 30v
folio.l: And while I lyue , a Mayde I wol the serue
¢ The fires brennen , vp on the auter clere
While Emelye , was thus , in hire preyere
But sodeynly she sey , a sigút queynte
For rigút a non , on of the fires queynte
And quyked a geyn , and after that a non~
That other fir was queynt , and al a gon~
And as it queynt , it made a whistelyng
As don theise wete brondes , in here brennyng
And at the brondes ende , ou©t ran a non~
As it were blody dropes , many on
For whicú so sore a gast , was Emelye
That she was wol ny mad , and gan to crye
For she ne wyst , what it signified
But only for the feer , thus hath she cried
And wepte , æat it was pite for to here
¢ And ther with al , Diane gan a pere
With bowe in hond , rigút as an huntresse
And seide dougúter , stynt thyn heuynesse
Among the goddes hie , it is a fermed
And by et äne word , wryten and confermed
Thow shalt ben wedded , vn to on of tho
That han for the , so meche care and woo
But vn to whicú of hem , I may nat telle
Fare wel , I may no lengere dwelle
The fires whicú , that on myn auter brenne
Shuln the declaren , er that æow go henne
Thyn auenture of loue , as in this caas
And with æ word , the arwes in the caas
Of the goddesse , clateren faste and rynge
And forth she went , and mad a vanasshynge
For whicú this Emelye , a stoyned was
And seide , what amountith this , allas
I putte me , in thyn protecciou~
Diane , and in thyn disposiciou~
And hom she goth a non , the next wey
This is the effect , there is no more to sey
¢ The next houre , of Mars , folwyng this
Arcite , vn to the temple , walked is
Of fiers Mars , to don his sacrefice
With alle the rigútes , of his payen wyse
With pitous hert , and hie deuociou~
Rigút thus to Mars , he seid his orisou~
O Strong god , that in the regnes cold

note.notetxt: O1515 The Ornamental Capital is three-line but takes in line 1514 which is the line above.Est

folio.l: Of Trace , honoåed art , and god I hold
